Adriaen van de Velde

5 works in the gallery.

Sleeping Shepherds
by Adriaen van de Velde
Netherlands · 1663 · oil on wood
Seated Woman Searching for Fleas
by Adriaen van de Velde
Netherlands · c. 1671 · red chalk over black chalk; framing lines in pen and brown ink
Cow and Two Sheep at the Foot of a Tree
by Adriaen van de Velde
Netherlands · 1670 · etching

by Adriaen van de Velde
Netherlands · 1670 · etching
